results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Guden - Page 1
results.snippet: The spring latch is made up of several components like clips, a single leaf, pins and springs which are all also available below. Each spring latch has a spring-loaded retactable pin with a bent end to easily open or close a door, lid, cover or gate with ease.

results.title: Door Push Latches - Armstrong Locks Hardware
results.snippet: Door push latches (or push-to-open/touch latches) are hardware mechanisms that allow doors, cabinets, or drawers to open with a gentle push, eliminating the need for handles for a clean, handle-free look, often using a spring-loaded plunger or magnet to hold them shut and release them when pressed.
